interpretation: The CO-OPS flat flag is an official real flat-tolerance label, but in the recent preliminary API snapshot the F=1 rows have blank water_level values. Aligning one_minute_water_level at the same timestamps recovers only sparse numeric values, which is not enough for a robust PrivSAF performance panel. This source remains a strong label source but is not yet a ready value+label benchmark without an earlier/raw value layer.
source: NOAA CO-OPS recent water_level flat-flag rows with one_minute value alignment
